titleStmt.title: SII 38.291: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 291. (A.R. No. 291 of 1912.) KUṞAṄGAṆIMUṬṬAM, CHEYYAR TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the south wall, central shrine, Koyyāmalarīśvara temple.

summary.p: This records the gift of all land at the hamlet, Sattimaṅgalam alias Ammainallūr in Ērikīḻ-nāḍu along with the taxes such as veṭṭi, śiṟupāḍikāval, kaḍamai, antarāyam and other dues to the temple of Tirukkuraṅgaṇimuṭṭam-uḍaiyār at Tirukkuraṅgaṇimuṭṭam of the above nāḍu in Kāliyūr-kōṭṭam, as dēvadāna by an individual Pūṅga . . m-uḍaiyān Nīraṇiñjān Sēdirāyaṉ, on the orders of Nāgasambhuvarāyar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . maturaiyum pāṇṭiyanmuṭittalaiyum koṇṭaruḷiya sirikulottuṅka co
ḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu Irupatāvatu taiymātam kāliyūrkoṭṭattu Erikiḻnāṭṭu tirukkuraṅkaṇimuṭṭattu
Āḷuṭaiyār tirukkuraṅkaṇimuṭṭamuṭaiyāṟku tevatānamāka pūṅkā muṭaiyān niṟaṇiñcān cetirāyan ko
ṇṭu miṭṭa Iverikiḻnāṭṭu cattimaṅkalamāna Ammainallūr nāṟpāllellaikka muḷḷu viḷainila
mum kollai nilamum tevatāyamākaviṭṭu Inta Ūrilvanta veṭṭit tanivuḷ ciṟupāṭikāval Uḷḷiṭṭa pala
āyaṅkaḷum kācāyaṅkaḷum Āka palatu makkaḷuperāl kaṭamaikku kaṇkāṇi mā nellum cikāriyappe
ṟu Uḷḷiṭṭa Antarāyam Ināyaka(ā)ṟkku maṭṭu kalluveṭṭi kuṭuttatu nākacampuvarāyar tirumukappaṭiye Iv
vūr Innāyanāṟku tevatānamāka viṭṭatu .
Digital edition of SII 38.291 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
